name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
description: Premium wireless headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and crystal-clear sound quality. Perfect for music lovers and remote workers.

name: Smartphone Stand & Charger
description: Adjustable aluminum smartphone stand with built-in 15W wireless charging pad. Compatible with all Qi-enabled devices.

name: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
description: Full-size mechanical keyboard with RGB backlight, tactile blue switches, and durable aluminum frame. Ideal for gaming and typing enthusiasts.

name: USB-C Hub 7-in-1
description: Compact 7-in-1 USB-C hub with HDMI 4K, 3x USB 3.0, SD card reader, and 100W PD charging. Essential for laptop users.

name: Men's Casual Polo Shirt
description: Comfortable 100% cotton polo shirt available in multiple colors. Slim fit design suitable for casual and semi-formal occasions.

name: Women's Floral Dress
description: Elegant floral print midi dress with adjustable waist tie. Made from breathable chiffon fabric, perfect for summer outings.

name: Leather Crossbody Bag
description: Genuine leather crossbody bag with multiple compartments and adjustable strap. Stylish and functional for everyday use.

name: Running Sneakers
description: Lightweight running shoes with responsive foam cushioning and breathable mesh upper. Designed for long-distance comfort.

name: Organic Green Tea (100g)
description: Premium Japanese matcha green tea, stone-ground from shade-grown leaves. Rich in antioxidants with a smooth, earthy flavor.

name: Dark Chocolate Gift Box
description: Assorted premium dark chocolates with 70% cacao content. Includes 12 handcrafted pieces in an elegant gift box.

name: Cold Brew Coffee Pack
description: Ready-to-brew cold brew coffee kit with 6 single-serve bags of specialty Arabica beans. Smooth, low-acid taste.

name: Mixed Nuts & Dried Fruits
description: Premium blend of almonds, cashews, walnuts, and dried cranberries. No added sugar or preservatives. 500g resealable pack.
